title: cytisus austriacus var. albus
intro: Cytisus austriacus var. albus, also known as Austrian white broom, is a variety of the Cytisus austriacus plant, a flowering shrub native to Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract issues. The health benefits of Cytisus austriacus var. albus include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat conditions such as hypertension, kidney stones, and eczema.
